_doc: Approved-only whitelist for Databento LIVE subscriptions. Only entries verified to preflight at $0.00 USD per day belong here. The sidecar (data-sources/pipelines/databento_live.py) calls metadata.get_cost(start=now, end=now+1day) at startup and refuses to subscribe to any entry that returns non-zero. Live = L0 (Status, Statistics, Definitions, Trades, OHLCV) + L1 (TBBO, BBO, MBP-1) on GLBX.MDP3 (CME Globex) only. See docs/UNIVERSES.md.
